name: Apricot Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Large old fashioned Oat Flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine white flour, oat flakes, wheat flakes, baking soda, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. Cream butter or margarine and brown sugar together until light.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
5. Stir in the dry ingredients.
6. Add chopped dried apricots and raisins; stir until fruit is well distributed.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
